content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement (Two‑Way) – University of Bristol
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_15_nda_19

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Standard library imports (implicit in most environments)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
open std.collections
open std.strings

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – Parties to the agreement
type Party = {
    name: string,
    address: string
}

@ Clause 2 – Confidential information as defined in the agreement
type ConfidentialInformation = {
    -- The information is marked as confidential by the disclosing party
    marked_confidential: bool,
    -- Source of the information (the disclosing party)
    source: Party,
    -- Whether the information is already in the public domain
    is_public_domain: bool,
    -- Whether the receiving party already possessed the information
    is_preexisting: bool,
    -- Whether the information was independently developed by the receiving party
    is_independently_developed: bool,
    -- Whether the information was received from a third party without a similar restriction
    is_third_party_unrestricted: bool,
    -- Whether disclosure is required by law / regulatory authority
    is_required_by_law: bool
}

@ Clause 5 – Temporal context (effective date expressed as an integer “years since effective”)
type TemporalContext = {
    years_since_effective: int   -- 0 at the effective date, increments each year
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities (public model objects)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – The two parties
entity disclosing_party: Party
entity receiving_party: Party

@ Clause 2 – The confidential material that may be exchanged
entity confidential_information: ConfidentialInformation

@ Clause 5 – Time tracking for the 10‑year non‑disclosure period
entity temporal_context: TemporalContext

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper Functions (pure, used in rules)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
func is_exception(info: ConfidentialInformation) -> bool:
    -- The statutory exceptions listed in Clause 4
    info.is_public_domain
    or info.is_preexisting
    or info.is_independently_developed
    or info.is_third_party_unrestricted
    or info.is_required_by_law

func within_10_years(ctx: TemporalContext) -> bool:
    ctx.years_since_effective <= 10

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Obligations, Prohibitions and Permissions (deontic rules)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 3a – Reasonable measures to protect confidentiality
rule O take_reasonable_measures:
    -- The receiving party must maintain confidentiality at all times
    true always

@ Clause 3b – No commercial use without licence
rule F use_for_commercial_purpose:
    -- The receiving party must not use the information for commercial purposes
    true always

@ Clause 3c – No disclosure to third parties without permission
rule F disclose_to_third_party:
    -- Prohibition applies unless an exception (Clause 4) holds
    not is_exception(confidential_information) always

@ Clause 3d – Disclosure only to employees who need to know
rule O disclose_to_employees:
    -- Employees may receive the information only if they are bound by the same confidentiality
    true always

@ Clause 3e – No copying or abstracting without permission
rule F make_copy_or_abstract:
    -- Prohibited unless an exception (Clause 4) holds
    not is_exception(confidential_information) always

@ Clause 3f – Acknowledge source and mark as “Confidential”
rule O acknowledge_and_mark:
    -- The receiving party must label the material appropriately
    true always

@ Clause 1 – Return of loaned documents on request
rule O return_documents_on_request:
    -- The receiving party must return all supplied material when asked
    true always

@ Clause 4 – No transfer of ownership
rule O no_transfer_of_ownership:
    -- Ownership remains with the disclosing party
    true always

@ Clause 5 – Ten‑year non‑disclosure period (survives termination)
rule O non_disclosure_10_years:
    -- For the first ten years after the effective date the receiving party must not disclose
    within_10_years(temporal_context) implies not is_exception(confidential_information) always

@ Clause 5 – Survival of core obligations beyond the ten‑year term
rule O obligations_survive_termination:
    -- Certain obligations (e.g., no transfer of ownership, source acknowledgement) persist indefinitely
    true always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# End of module
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
```
